channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What we know about Iran's apparent plot to assassinate President Trump
item.description: Israeli officials alerted the Trump administration to an apparent Iranian plot to assassinate him as the war between the two countries continues.

item.title: Trump again says Iran ceasefire is over, but U.S. will keep talking
item.description: Efforts are underway to restart U.S.-Iran peace talks after the most intense exchange of attacks since the ceasefire took effect.

item.title: WATCH: Pentagon releases 4th batch of UFO files
item.description: ABC News' Luis Martinez reports on the latest release from the Pentagon.

item.title: Prince Harry, Meghan visit King Charles after security controversy
item.description: Prince Harry and Meghan have a strained relationship with the prince's father.
